description:
# ­¤Æ½ AstraAuction ╬▓ **Market (Auction) plugin for [Lumi](https://github.com/koshakminedev/lumi).** **EN** | **[RU](https://github.com/task-v1/AstraAuction/blob/master/README_ru.md)** | **[UA](https://github.com/task-v1/AstraAuction/blob/master/README_ua.md)** | **[JA](https://github.com/task-v1/AstraAuction/blob/master/README_ja.md)**
## Description ­¤ō¢ AstraAuction is a player-to-player marketplace plugin for [Lumi](https://github.com/koshakminedev/lumi). The plugin preserves full item NBT, stores data in a database, and provides a clean and convenient GUI with search, sorting, and lot management. ## Features ­¤ī¤ - **NBT preservation** ŌĆö items are sold exactly as they were owned by the seller. - **Asynchronous database** ŌĆö all queries run in the background without blocking the main thread. - **Transaction fee** ŌĆö configurable tax percentage. - **Return storage (claims)** ŌĆö unsold lots and payments for offline sellers are stored until expiration. - **GUI market** ŌĆö buying, confirmation dialogs, and page navigation. - **Sorting and search** ŌĆö sort by price and search by item name. - **Manage your lots** ŌĆö view and cancel active lots via GUI. - **Flexible database support** ŌĆö SQLite / MySQL. - **Localization** ŌĆö built-in support for `eng`, `rus`, `ukr`, `jpn`, with the ability to add custom languages. ## Screenshots ­¤¢╝’ĖÅ | **Main market page** | **My lots page** | |---|---| | ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/task-v1/AstraAuction/master/assets/base.jpg) | ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/task-v1/AstraAuction/master/assets/my_lots.jpg) | | **Return storage page** | **Purchase confirmation page** | |---|---| | ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/task-v1/AstraAuction/master/assets/claims.jpg) | ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/task-v1/AstraAuction/master/assets/confirm.jpg) | ## Commands ŌÖ┐ | **Command** | **Description** | **Permission** | |---|---|---| | `/ah` | Open the market | `astraauction.use` | | `/ah open [page: int]` | Open the market at a specific page | `astraauction.use` | | `/ah sell ` | List the item in hand | `astraauction.use` | | `/ah view [page: int]` | View lots of a specific player | `astraauction.use` | | `/ah search [page: int]` | Search lots by name | `astraauction.use` | | `/ah force_buy ` | Force-buy a lot (processed like a normal purchase) | `astraauction.force` | | `/ah force_expire ` | Force-expire a lot | `astraauction.force` | **Command aliases:** `/auction`, `/auc`. ## Permissions ­¤öÉ - `astraauction.use` ŌĆö access to basic commands (granted to everyone by default). - `astraauction.force` ŌĆö access to force commands (granted to operators only by default). ## Configuration ŌÜÖ’ĖÅ Main configuration file: [config.yml](https://github.com/task-v1/AstraAuction/blob/master/src/main/resources/config.yml) | Parameter | Description | Default | |---|---|---| | `database.type` | Database type: `sqlite` / `mysql` | `sqlite` | | `language.value` | Language mode: `eng` / `rus` / `ukr` / `jpn` / `autodetect` / `server` | `autodetect` | | `language.default` | Default language | `eng` | | `auction.duration-seconds` | Lot lifetime (seconds) | `172800` (48h) | | `auction.tax-percent` | Transaction fee (%) | `10.0` | | `auction.round-prices` | Round prices to whole numbers | `false` | | `auction.max-slots` | Max active lots (0 = unlimited) | `6` | | `auction.claim-expire-seconds` | Claims storage duration (seconds) | `604800` (7d) | | `auction.gui.page-size` | GUI page size (up to 45) | `45` | | `auction.gui.open-delay-ticks` | GUI open delay (ticks) | `10` | | `auction.gui.sort-default` | Default sorting | `price_asc` | ## Dependencies ­¤öī - **[EconomyAPI](https://cloudburstmc.org/resources/economyapi.14/)** ŌĆö required for purchases and payouts. - **[FakeInventories](https://github.com/LuminiaDev/FakeInventories)** ŌĆö required for GUI support. - **[JOOQConnector](https://github.com/MEFRREEX/JOOQConnector)** ŌĆö database support via JOOQ ORM. - **[Polyglot](https://github.com/DensyDev/Polyglot)** ŌĆö localization engine for dynamic language loading (shaded). ## Building from Source ­¤ö© 1. Install **[JDK 21+](https://www.google.com/search?q=jdk+21)**. 2. [Clone the repository](https://www.google.com/search?q=how+to+clone+git+repository) and open the project directory. 3. Run the build command: `./gradlew build` 4. The compiled JAR will be located in `build/libs`. ### Build Warning ŌÜĀ’ĖÅ The repository contains two `build.gradle` files: one main file (using fallback repositories via `jitpack.io`) and another with the `.old` suffix (with original Lumi repositories). If Lumi repositories are temporarily unavailable (e.g. HTTP 500 errors) and the build fails, just use the current `build.gradle` as-is. Alternatively, to use the original Lumi repositories, remove or move the current `build.gradle`, and rename `build.gradle.old` by removing the `.old` suffix.
name: AstraAuction
summary: Auction plugin scaffold for Lumi (Nukkit-MOT fork)
